NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (TRANSACTION ID # 55457197) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, JENNY HEARING SET FOR JUN-16-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302
MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (TRANSACTION ID # 55457197) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, JENNY

DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JENNY LEE'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN HAS FAILED TO SERVE RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION WHICH WERE SERVED TO HIS COUNSEL ANTHONY GILES ON JANUARY 9, 2014. THE COURT RECORD INDICATES THAT PLAINTIFF JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN SUBSTITUTED OUT MR. GILES ON FEBRUARY 4, 2014 AND IS NOW SELF REPRESENTED. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT JENNY LEE SENT A LETTER TO PLAINTIFF JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN ON APRIL 23, 2014 GIVING HIM10 DAYS TO RESPOND TO THE FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION. PLAINTIFF JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN IS HEREBY ORDERED TO SERVE ORIGINAL, VERIFIED, COMPLETE RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION TO DEFENDANT JENNY LEE'S FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND PAY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $420 TO STRATMAN, PATTERSON & HUNTER WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THE SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER ARISING FROM THIS HEARING. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER VAN ZANDT, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA; NOT REPORTED.C 391.

SIMS III, ESQ. (TRANSACTION ID # 55457220) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, JENNY
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO HAVE ADMISSION REQUESTS DEEMED ADMITTED

DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JENNY LEE'S MOTION TO HAVE ADMISSION REQUESTS DEEMED ADMITTED IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN HAS FAILED TO SERVE ANY RESPONSE TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION SERVED ON FEBRUARY 26, 2014. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT JENNY LEE SENT A LETTER TO PLAINTIFF JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN ON APRIL 23, 2014 GIVING HIM 10 DAYS TO RESPOND WHICH HE HAS FAILED TO DO. THE LETTER ERRONEOUSLY STATES THAT THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION WERE SERVED ON MARCH 3, 2014, BUT THE COURT FINDS NO PREJUDICE ARISING FROM THIS ERROR. PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 2033.280 (A)-(B) THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $60 ARE TO BE PAID BY PLAINTIFF JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN TO STRATMAN, PATTERSON & HUNTER WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THE SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER ARISING FROM THIS HEARING. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER VAN ZANDT, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA; NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Demand For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hunter W. Sims III, Esq., 510.457.3468, for defendant Jenny Lee; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant JENNY LEE's Motion to Compel Answers to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Demand for Production is GRANTED. Plaintiff JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN has failed to serve responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Demand for Production which were served to his counsel Anthony Giles on January 9, 2014. The court record indicates that Plaintiff JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN substituted out Mr. Giles on February 4, 2014 and is now self represented. Counsel for defendant JENNY LEE sent a letter to plaintiff JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN on April 23, 2014 giving him10 days to respond to the Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Demand for Production. Plaintiff JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN is hereby ORDERED to serve original, verified, complete responses without objection to Defendant JENNY LEE's Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Demand for Production and pay sanctions in the amount of $420 to Stratman, Patterson & Hunter within 20 days of the service of Notice of Entry of the Order arising from this hearing. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Not Reported.

Defendants Motion To Have Admission Requets Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hunter W. Sims III, Esq., 510.457.3468, for defendant Jenny Lee; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant JENNY LEE's Motion to Have Admission Requests Deemed Admitted is GRANTED. Plaintiff JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN has failed to serve any response to Requests for Admission served on February 26, 2014. Counsel for defendant JENNY LEE sent a letter to plaintiff JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN on April 23, 2014 giving him 10 days to respond which he has failed to do. The letter erroneously states that the Requests for Admission were served on March 3, 2014, but the court finds no prejudice arising from this error. Pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.280 (a)-(b) the Requests for Admission are deemed admitted. Sanctions in the amount of $60 are to be paid by plaintiff JEREMY AKSDAL-JANSEN to Stratman, Patterson & Hunter within 20 days of the service of Notice of Entry of the Order arising from this hearing. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Van Zandt, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Not Reported.
